prompt: A camera scans pallet barcodes. After scanning, an Agv moves to pick the pallet. Once the AGV is loaded, the conveyor moves then the robot arm places the pallet onto a shelf.
constraints: AGV moves to pick the pallet after scanning.
Conveyor moves only after Agv is loaded
Conveyor must move before RobotArm places the pallet onto a shelf

results.constraint: AGV moves to pick the pallet after scanning.

  "pattern_used": "sequential_workflow",
  "operator_used": ["-->"]
}
